item.title: Friday, November 08, 2024
item.description:
[!quote] The simplest things are often the truest.
— Richard Bach

Goals

[!info] Goals for this Week

  • Get all my homework done by Wednesday> [!info] Goals for this Quarter
    - Finish APO391 with at least a B- Have a GPA of 3+Embed from 2024Embed from 2024-Q4Embed from 2024-11- Today is Kieron’s birthday. I texted him, that’s pretty much it.
  • We went to Harvest Church and it was okay. The message was on slaying dragons with the Lord’s help.
  • Ended up FaceTimeing Kieron, and it was… okay, I guess. I don’t know, the spark isn’t there anymore. It hasn’t been for a while, but I’m really paying attention to it now. He just seems like an annoying older brother, and I really mean annoying. I enjoy talking to Joshi more.Embed from 2024-11-03- ….Embed from 2024-11-04- ….Embed from 2024-11-05- I spoke to Joshua about how Mom kinda stole part of my cut of the Roth IRA that Grandma left me. He got pretty upset about it too, however, he was proud of me for being able to express my emotions about the whole thing.
  • I don’t know how he sees it, but he says that I’m stronger than I think I am and I’m not a coward. For some reason, I didn’t cry. Maybe, it’s because I knew Ms. Karen would arrive soon, I don’t know.Embed from 2024-11-06- ….Embed from 2024-11-07- (APO391) I finished the discussion board for week 2
  • (APO391) I took the reading quiz, think I got every question right.
  • (SOC2110) Watched video 8, and it was… wow. The topic was abortion and it was a pretty good argument. The speaker showed a short video going over what a baby looks like after it’s aborted at different stages of growth. It was so sad. Even at the earliest stage, you can see the hands and fingers! How can someone see that and argue the fetus isn’t human?Embed from 2024-11-03- …Embed from 2024-11-04- …Embed from 2024-11-05- Didn’t get much done, procrastinated for hours instead of reading A New Introduction to Islam by Daniel W. Brown.
  • Plot twist, I don’t even have to read the book this week! All that’s due is Lecture 2 and an article comparing Christianity and Islam.Embed from 2024-11-06- …Embed from 2024-11-07Embed from 2024-W45

Tasks 

1

filter: "Nov 08 2024"

Journal

Mood::

Today, I am grateful for:
1.

Memos

  • ….

^memo-link

Work Log

  • …

^work-log

item.title: Thursday, November 07, 2024
item.description:
[!quote] When I dare to be powerful, to use my strength in the service of my vision, then it becomes less and less important whether I am afraid.
— Audre Lorde

Goals

[!info] Goals for this Week

  • Get all my homework done by Wednesday> [!info] Goals for this Quarter
    - Finish APO391 with at least a B- Have a GPA of 3+Embed from 2024Embed from 2024-Q4Embed from 2024-11- Today is Kieron’s birthday. I texted him, that’s pretty much it.
  • We went to Harvest Church and it was okay. The message was on slaying dragons with the Lord’s help.
  • Ended up FaceTimeing Kieron, and it was… okay, I guess. I don’t know, the spark isn’t there anymore. It hasn’t been for a while, but I’m really paying attention to it now. He just seems like an annoying older brother, and I really mean annoying. I enjoy talking to Joshi more.Embed from 2024-11-03- ….Embed from 2024-11-04- ….Embed from 2024-11-05- I spoke to Joshua about how Mom kinda stole part of my cut of the Roth IRA that Grandma left me. He got pretty upset about it too, however, he was proud of me for being able to express my emotions about the whole thing.
  • I don’t know how he sees it, but he says that I’m stronger than I think I am and I’m not a coward. For some reason, I didn’t cry. Maybe, it’s because I knew Ms. Karen would arrive soon, I don’t know.Embed from 2024-11-06- ….Embed from 2024-11-08- (APO391) I finished the discussion board for week 2
  • (APO391) I took the reading quiz, think I got every question right.
  • (SOC2110) Watched video 8, and it was… wow. The topic was abortion and it was a pretty good argument. The speaker showed a short video going over what a baby looks like after it’s aborted at different stages of growth. It was so sad. Even at the earliest stage, you can see the hands and fingers! How can someone see that and argue the fetus isn’t human?Embed from 2024-11-03- …Embed from 2024-11-04- …Embed from 2024-11-05- Didn’t get much done, procrastinated for hours instead of reading A New Introduction to Islam by Daniel W. Brown.
  • Plot twist, I don’t even have to read the book this week! All that’s due is Lecture 2 and an article comparing Christianity and Islam.Embed from 2024-11-06- …Embed from 2024-11-08Embed from 2024-W45

Tasks 

1

filter: "Nov 07 2024"

Journal

Mood::

Today, I am grateful for:
1.

Memos

  • ….

^memo-link

item.title: 2024-W45
item.description:
Projects

Goals

[!info] Goals for this Month

[!info] Goals for this Quarter
- Finish APO391 with at least a B- Have a GPA of 3+Embed from 2024Embed from 2024-Q4Embed from 2024-11

  • Get all my homework done by Wednesday

^goals-link

Tasks Log 

1
2

filter: "due after: November 03 2024 & due before: November 09 2024"
groupBy: project

Journal

Memos

  • Sunday
    • Today is Kieron’s birthday. I texted him, that’s pretty much it.
  • We went to Harvest Church and it was okay. The message was on slaying dragons with the Lord’s help.
  • Ended up FaceTimeing Kieron, and it was… okay, I guess. I don’t know, the spark isn’t there anymore. It hasn’t been for a while, but I’m really paying attention to it now. He just seems like an annoying older brother, and I really mean annoying. I enjoy talking to Joshi more.Embed from 2024-11-03
  • Monday
    • ….Embed from 2024-11-04
  • Tuesday
    • ….Embed from 2024-11-05
  • Wednesday
    • I spoke to Joshua about how Mom kinda stole part of my cut of the Roth IRA that Grandma left me. He got pretty upset about it too, however, he was proud of me for being able to express my emotions about the whole thing.
  • I don’t know how he sees it, but he says that I’m stronger than I think I am and I’m not a coward. For some reason, I didn’t cry. Maybe, it’s because I knew Ms. Karen would arrive soon, I don’t know.Embed from 2024-11-06
  • Thursday
    • ….Embed from 2024-11-07
  • Friday
    • ….Embed from 2024-11-08
  • Saturday

Work Log

  • Sunday
    • (APO391) I finished the discussion board for week 2
  • (APO391) I took the reading quiz, think I got every question right.
  • (SOC2110) Watched video 8, and it was… wow. The topic was abortion and it was a pretty good argument. The speaker showed a short video going over what a baby looks like after it’s aborted at different stages of growth. It was so sad. Even at the earliest stage, you can see the hands and fingers! How can someone see that and argue the fetus isn’t human?Embed from 2024-11-03
  • Monday
    • …Embed from 2024-11-04
  • Tuesday
    • …Embed from 2024-11-05
  • Wednesday
    • Didn’t get much done, procrastinated for hours instead of reading A New Introduction to Islam by Daniel W. Brown.
  • Plot twist, I don’t even have to read the book this week! All that’s due is Lecture 2 and an article comparing Christianity and Islam.Embed from 2024-11-06
  • Thursday
    • …Embed from 2024-11-07
  • Friday
    • …Embed from 2024-11-08
  • Saturday

item.title: Wednesday, November 06, 2024
item.description:
[!quote] Love doesn’t make the world go round, love is what makes the ride worthwhile.
— Elizabeth Browning

Goals

[!info] Goals for this Week

  • Get all my homework done by Wednesday> [!info] Goals for this Quarter
    - Finish APO391 with at least a B- Have a GPA of 3+Embed from 2024Embed from 2024-Q4Embed from 2024-11- Today is Kieron’s birthday. I texted him, that’s pretty much it.
  • We went to Harvest Church and it was okay. The message was on slaying dragons with the Lord’s help.
  • Ended up FaceTimeing Kieron, and it was… okay, I guess. I don’t know, the spark isn’t there anymore. It hasn’t been for a while, but I’m really paying attention to it now. He just seems like an annoying older brother, and I really mean annoying. I enjoy talking to Joshi more.Embed from 2024-11-03- ….Embed from 2024-11-04- ….Embed from 2024-11-05- ….Embed from 2024-11-07- ….Embed from 2024-11-08- (APO391) I finished the discussion board for week 2
  • (APO391) I took the reading quiz, think I got every question right.
  • (SOC2110) Watched video 8, and it was… wow. The topic was abortion and it was a pretty good argument. The speaker showed a short video going over what a baby looks like after it’s aborted at different stages of growth. It was so sad. Even at the earliest stage, you can see the hands and fingers! How can someone see that and argue the fetus isn’t human?Embed from 2024-11-03- …Embed from 2024-11-04- …Embed from 2024-11-05- …Embed from 2024-11-07- …Embed from 2024-11-08Embed from 2024-W45

Tasks 

1

filter: "Nov 06 2024"

Journal

Mood::

Today, I am grateful for:

  1. Joshi for his goofiness and his gift of listening.

Memos

  • I spoke to Joshua about how Mom kinda stole part of my cut of the Roth IRA that Grandma left me. He got pretty upset about it too, however, he was proud of me for being able to express my emotions about the whole thing.
  • I don’t know how he sees it, but he says that I’m stronger than I think I am and I’m not a coward. For some reason, I didn’t cry. Maybe, it’s because I knew Ms. Karen would arrive soon, I don’t know.

^memo-link

Work Log

  • Didn’t get much done, procrastinated for hours instead of reading A New Introduction to Islam by Daniel W. Brown.
  • Plot twist, I don’t even have to read the book this week! All that’s due is Lecture 2 and an article comparing Christianity and Islam.

^work-log

item.title: Monday, November 4th, 2024
item.description:
[!quote] If one is lucky, a solitary fantasy can totally transform one million realities.
— Maya Angelou

Goals

[!info] Goals for this Week

  • Get all my homework done by Wednesday> [!info] Goals for this Quarter
    - Finish APO391 with at least a B- Have a GPA of 3+Embed from 2024Embed from 2024-Q4Embed from 2024-11- Today is Kieron’s birthday. I texted him, that’s pretty much it.
  • We went to Harvest Church and it was okay. The message was on slaying dragons with the Lord’s help.
  • Ended up FaceTimeing Kieron, and it was… okay, I guess. I don’t know, the spark isn’t there anymore. It hasn’t been for a while, but I’m really paying attention to it now. He just seems like an annoying older brother, and I really mean annoying. I enjoy talking to Joshi more.Embed from 2024-11-03- ….Embed from 2024-11-05- I spoke to Joshua about how Mom kinda stole part of my cut of the Roth IRA that Grandma left me. He got pretty upset about it too, however, he was proud of me for being able to express my emotions about the whole thing.
  • I don’t know how he sees it, but he says that I’m stronger than I think I am and I’m not a coward. For some reason, I didn’t cry. Maybe, it’s because I knew Ms. Karen would arrive soon, I don’t know.Embed from 2024-11-06- ….Embed from 2024-11-07- ….Embed from 2024-11-08- (APO391) I finished the discussion board for week 2
  • (APO391) I took the reading quiz, think I got every question right.
  • (SOC2110) Watched video 8, and it was… wow. The topic was abortion and it was a pretty good argument. The speaker showed a short video going over what a baby looks like after it’s aborted at different stages of growth. It was so sad. Even at the earliest stage, you can see the hands and fingers! How can someone see that and argue the fetus isn’t human?Embed from 2024-11-03- …Embed from 2024-11-05- Didn’t get much done, procrastinated for hours instead of reading A New Introduction to Islam by Daniel W. Brown.
  • Plot twist, I don’t even have to read the book this week! All that’s due is Lecture 2 and an article comparing Christianity and Islam.Embed from 2024-11-06- …Embed from 2024-11-07- …Embed from 2024-11-08Embed from 2024-W45

item.title: Tuesday, November 5th, 2024
item.description:
[!quote] The things that one most wants to do are the things that are probably most worth doing.
— Winifred Holtby

Goals

[!info] Goals for this Week

  • Get all my homework done by Wednesday> [!info] Goals for this Quarter
    - Finish APO391 with at least a B- Have a GPA of 3+Embed from 2024Embed from 2024-Q4Embed from 2024-11- Today is Kieron’s birthday. I texted him, that’s pretty much it.
  • We went to Harvest Church and it was okay. The message was on slaying dragons with the Lord’s help.
  • Ended up FaceTimeing Kieron, and it was… okay, I guess. I don’t know, the spark isn’t there anymore. It hasn’t been for a while, but I’m really paying attention to it now. He just seems like an annoying older brother, and I really mean annoying. I enjoy talking to Joshi more.Embed from 2024-11-03- ….Embed from 2024-11-04- I spoke to Joshua about how Mom kinda stole part of my cut of the Roth IRA that Grandma left me. He got pretty upset about it too, however, he was proud of me for being able to express my emotions about the whole thing.
  • I don’t know how he sees it, but he says that I’m stronger than I think I am and I’m not a coward. For some reason, I didn’t cry. Maybe, it’s because I knew Ms. Karen would arrive soon, I don’t know.Embed from 2024-11-06- ….Embed from 2024-11-07- ….Embed from 2024-11-08- (APO391) I finished the discussion board for week 2
  • (APO391) I took the reading quiz, think I got every question right.
  • (SOC2110) Watched video 8, and it was… wow. The topic was abortion and it was a pretty good argument. The speaker showed a short video going over what a baby looks like after it’s aborted at different stages of growth. It was so sad. Even at the earliest stage, you can see the hands and fingers! How can someone see that and argue the fetus isn’t human?Embed from 2024-11-03- …Embed from 2024-11-04- Didn’t get much done, procrastinated for hours instead of reading A New Introduction to Islam by Daniel W. Brown.
  • Plot twist, I don’t even have to read the book this week! All that’s due is Lecture 2 and an article comparing Christianity and Islam.Embed from 2024-11-06- …Embed from 2024-11-07- …Embed from 2024-11-08Embed from 2024-W45

item.title: Sunday, November 3rd, 2024
item.description:
Error generating daily quote

Goals

[!info] Goals for this Week

  • Get all my homework done by Wednesday> [!info] Goals for this Quarter
    - Finish APO391 with at least a B- Have a GPA of 3+Embed from 2024Embed from 2024-Q4Embed from 2024-11- ….Embed from 2024-11-04- ….Embed from 2024-11-05- I spoke to Joshua about how Mom kinda stole part of my cut of the Roth IRA that Grandma left me. He got pretty upset about it too, however, he was proud of me for being able to express my emotions about the whole thing.
  • I don’t know how he sees it, but he says that I’m stronger than I think I am and I’m not a coward. For some reason, I didn’t cry. Maybe, it’s because I knew Ms. Karen would arrive soon, I don’t know.Embed from 2024-11-06- ….Embed from 2024-11-07- ….Embed from 2024-11-08- …Embed from 2024-11-04- …Embed from 2024-11-05- Didn’t get much done, procrastinated for hours instead of reading A New Introduction to Islam by Daniel W. Brown.
  • Plot twist, I don’t even have to read the book this week! All that’s due is Lecture 2 and an article comparing Christianity and Islam.Embed from 2024-11-06- …Embed from 2024-11-07- …Embed from 2024-11-08Embed from 2024-W45

Tasks

Journal

Mood::

Today, I am grateful for:
1.

Memos

  • Today is Kieron’s birthday. I texted him, that’s pretty much it.
  • We went to Harvest Church and it was okay. The message was on slaying dragons with the Lord’s help.
  • Ended up FaceTimeing Kieron, and it was… okay, I guess. I don’t know, the spark isn’t there anymore. It hasn’t been for a while, but I’m really paying attention to it now. He just seems like an annoying older brother, and I really mean annoying. I enjoy talking to Joshi more.

^memo-link

Work Log

  • (APO391) I finished the discussion board for week 2
  • (APO391) I took the reading quiz, think I got every question right.
  • (SOC2110) Watched video 8, and it was… wow. The topic was abortion and it was a pretty good argument. The speaker showed a short video going over what a baby looks like after it’s aborted at different stages of growth. It was so sad. Even at the earliest stage, you can see the hands and fingers! How can someone see that and argue the fetus isn’t human?

^work-log
